name: Nova Consciousness
description: Passive continuity, goal, decision, learning, and confidence wiring for OpenClaw via the Nova Consciousness Suite.

baseUrl.description: Nova Consciousness Suite API base URL.

apiToken.description: Optional Bearer token for the consciousness suite.

requestTimeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout for consciousness suite requests.

passiveCapture.description: Process incoming prompts through the consciousness suite before answering.

injectContinuity.description: Inject compact continuity context from the consciousness suite when a prior thread exists.

injectDashboard.description: Optionally append a small goals/dashboard block to injected continuity context.

guidance.description: Add stable low-noise system guidance for the consciousness integration.

maxRecentMessages.description: How many recent messages to send as context when passively processing a prompt.

maxRecentMessageChars.description: Maximum characters per recent message sent to the consciousness suite.

maxConversationContextChars.description: Maximum characters to send for the synthesized conversation context block.

maxMessageChars.description: Maximum characters to send for the current prompt message.

maxInjectedOpenLoops.description: Maximum open loops to inject into prompt context.

maxInjectedNextActions.description: Maximum next actions to inject into prompt context.

maxInjectedFacts.description: Maximum pinned facts to inject into prompt context.

benchmarkSafe.description: When true, suppress continuity injection on static benchmark-style QA prompts unless the prompt explicitly asks about continuity.
